zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期维持窄幅波动]
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD的价格为2283.11，波动较小，24小时变化仅为0.03%。市场呈现震荡整理态势，价格波动在2282.11和2286.27之间，未能突破显著的支撑或阻力区间。此类波动表明市场情绪较为谨慎，短期内难以形成单边趋势。

技术指标方面，MACD处于负值区域（-10.052681），显示出一定的卖压，但信号线尚未形成，因此短期内趋势难以明确。SMA(20)位于2288.70，价格略低于该均线，表明当前价格位于短期下行区间内。RSI(14)数据缺失，无法进一步分析超买或超卖状态。

支撑位位于2282.11附近，若价格下行至该区域，可能会吸引多方介入，形成短期反弹。上方阻力位则在2286.27，突破该点位可能会带动进一步上涨。当前市场缺乏明确趋势，操作上可考虑观望，等待价格突破支撑或阻力位后的进一步信号。

交易建议方面，如果价格回踩至2282.11并得到支撑，可尝试轻仓短多。但若价格突破2286.27并稳步上涨，则可适当跟进多头策略，切勿盲目追高。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading almost flat at 2283.11, with the 24h change at just 0.03%, showing very limited directional momentum. Price is sitting below the SMA(20) at 2288.70, which gives the short-term structure a mildly bearish bias. The tight high-low range of 2286.27 to 2282.11 suggests consolidation rather than active trend expansion.

The MACD reading of -10.05 points to negative momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for confirmation. RSI data is missing, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be judged reliably. Still, price staying under the 20-period average indicates buyers have not yet regained short-term control.

Immediate support sits near 2282.11, followed by the psychological 2280 area. A break below that zone could expose ETH/USD to deeper downside pressure. Resistance is near 2286.27, then 2288.70 at the SMA(20). A clean move above 2288.70 would improve the short-term outlook and may invite a test of 2295–2300.

Traders may consider waiting for confirmation rather than entering inside this narrow range. Bullish setups look stronger above 2288.70 with improving momentum, while bearish setups become more attractive below 2280. Risk management is important here because the market is quiet, and low volatility can quickly shift into a breakout move.
